mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20-day returns occur in fewer than 45% of rate-decline months.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0 percent, labor market deterioration signals weakening consumer demand and corporate earnings pressure, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 60-day returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0%, or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real sales of autos and light trucks combined with stable consumer price inflation indicates robust consumer purchasing power without monetary erosion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to generate a positive mean return when RSAFS increases and CPIAUCSL growth remains below 2.0%, or interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during periods of accommodative monetary policy reflects expanding corporate capacity utilization and supply-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to predict positive 5-day returns when FEDFUNDS is above 3.0%, or the predictive alpha decays to zero within 3 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll employment gain exceeding 150 thousand signals strong labor market tightening and rising wage growth, which boosts corporate revenue expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases by more than 150 thousand in a single month
failure_condition: Payroll gains above 150k are followed by negative 20-day returns in over 60% of cases, or the signal's Sharpe ratio drops below 0.5 in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly inflation acceleration above 0.4 percent forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy stances, increasing equity discount rates and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Elevated CPIAUCSL growth coincides with positive 60-day equity returns in more than 50% of observations, or the negative correlation coefficient falls below -0.10 in rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding housing starts alongside accelerating gross domestic product confirms broad-based economic expansion and construction sector momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined HOUST and GDPC1 uptrend fails to yield positive 20-day returns when real interest rates are rising, or the interaction effect becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive months of declining industrial production indicate contracting manufacturing output and weakening supply-side fundamentals, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Consecutive INDPRO declines are followed by positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of instances, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE remains below 4.0%.
